production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# CASO-LIM-038-1A — CPU-bound features
bound = "cpu"
choice = "processes"
print(choice)
print("bound", bound)
print("ok", True)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Del instruction y theory del packet S38 completo el contrato de S38-T1-A-E1; pista: Para CPU-bound en CPython prefiere processes por el GIL..

exercises.code:
# CASO-LIM-038-1A2 — I/O-bound

choice = "async_or_threads"
print(choice)
print("bound", bound)
print("ok", True)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Según starter defectuoso de S38-T1-A-E2, corrijo solo la decisión/defecto. Hint: I/O-bound: threads o async liberan espera de red..

exercises.code:

payload = {"x": 2}
print(len(json.dumps(payload).encode()))
print("ok", True)
print("compact", True)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints + starter de S38-T1-B-E1: observabilidad y resiliencia del worker. Pista: json.dumps produce el blob estable; mide len(...encode())..

exercises.code:
def backoff(attempt, base=0.1):
    return base * 2 ** attempt
print(backoff(3))
print("ok", True)
print("attempt", 3)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Según starter defectuoso de S38-T4-B-E1, corrijo solo la decisión/defecto. Hint: Fórmula didáctica: base * 2**attempt..
